title: Ascendency Path of Forge
atAGlance: A defensive path emphasizing oath-bound warding, support play, and empowered equipment.
sageNotes: Forge bearers swear by ward, rune, and iron discipline, building safety before claiming glory. Their oaths are carried in gear, shield lines, and names remembered after a retreat. Veterans of Kharad-Vul still claim a true Forge adept can make a collapsing hold stand one hour longer than fate intended.
gameInformation: Ideal for protectors and support hybrids. Core unlock examples: Ember Ward, Runebond Armament, Bastion Pulse, and Anvil of Stars.
